case_title: FREGOSI & COMPANY PAINTS VS ALL CUSTOM WOODWORKS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALL CUSTOM WOODWORKS CARLOCK, TROY DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY THE PLTF. ON THE MORNING OF THE TRIAL. PLTF. INDICATED THE MATTER WAS RESOLVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
